ground.what_this_is: This is the Presence Dial, a control panel that lets you adjust how the system's 'Right-Hand-Man' (RHM) assistant behaves and speaks to you.
ground.what_you_can_do: You can click any of the 8 modes (Listening, Text-Only, Background, Focus, Walkthrough, Watch-and-React, Decide-for-Me, or Off) to instantly change the system's posture, loudness, and level of autonomy.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence dial region (runtime/suite.py:set_mode); changing the text-only behavior is a code change there.
howto.what: The text-only response switch on the presence dial.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click this to force the RHM to reply only in concise text, ignoring visual or complex modes; click again to restore the previous posture.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence dial region (runtime/suite.py:set_mode); changing the mode's behavior or adding new modes requires updating the MODES registry and the mode definition nodes.
howto.what: A specific presence mode (Watch-and-React) on the presence dial.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click this mode to instantly shift the system's posture from active listening to passive observation and reactive suggestion, adjusting its loudness and autonomy level.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence dial region (runtime/suite.py:set_mode); changing the rule requires updating the mode validation logic there.
howto.what: The self-approval prohibition indicator on the presence dial.
howto.what_you_can_do: It visually blocks the operator from selecting the 'self-approve' mode, preventing the system from granting itself authority in that posture.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the toolbar region (Toolbar.tsx); changing a mode is a code change there, surfaced via the RHM-modes registry.
howto.what: The Presence Dial on the toolbar, the mode selector for the Right-Hand-Man assistant.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click any of the 8 modes (Listening, Text-Only, Background, Focus, Walkthrough, Watch-and-React, Decide-for-Me, or Off) to instantly change the system's posture, loudness, and level of autonomy.

reasons: accuracy jury (Layer 2, SOFT — variance not error): no quorum that the dossier is grounded in the element (1 of 3 draws agreed grounded). Flagged for operator scrutiny.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence dial region (runtime/suite.py:set_mode); changing the mode label or description is a code change there.
howto.what: The deep work mode indicator on the presence dial.
howto.what_you_can_do: Select this mode to set the system's posture to 'deep work', which restricts its verbs to brief, focused updates and suppresses elaboration unless explicitly requested.

reasons: accuracy jury (Layer 2, SOFT — variance not error): no quorum that the dossier is grounded in the element (1 of 3 draws agreed grounded). Flagged for operator scrutiny.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the presence dial region (runtime/suite.py:set_mode); changing its behavior or adding new modes requires a code change there.
howto.what: The 'Decide-for-Me' switch on the presence dial.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click this to instantly grant the RHM full autonomy to make and execute decisions without operator input, effectively pausing the operator's direct control.
